Methodology

Transparency is core to this tool. Here is how we source, calculate, and present data across the platform.

Important Disclaimer

European Expat Hub provides indicative estimates and comparative data for informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial, tax, legal, or immigration advice. Always consult qualified professionals for decisions about relocation, taxation, and employment.
